items.name_en: Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
items.name_cn:
Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

items.name_cn:
West Hollywood_Small
If you love vintage bags and have always wanted a unique, everyday style, this is the perfect choice! It has a great vintage feel and a cool vibe~
The bag has plenty of capacity. With a flap design and four compartments including a zipper, the outer layer holds a lot, making it perfect for commuting or going out.
Size: 24×15×10
Model: 738820

Black Gold Clasp Caviar·
Envelope_Small Clutch
The latest V-patterned quilted envelope bag, Italian imported glossy cowhide. A very elegant style, paired with a classic gold logo hardware. Versatile! Shoulder or crossbody is fine! Also spacious!
Model: 526286
Size: 21×13×6cm

items.name_cn:
💰Niki Lambskin_28cm
For the spring/summer Niki lambskin, the metal chain has been replaced with a substantial gold chain, adding elegance and luxury to the bag. It's not overly trendy but still shows personality—a truly special bag! Using exclusive ZP original leather and highest-grade solid copper hardware, it definitely has that authentic ZP feel.
Model: 498894
Size: 28x20.5x8.5cm

items.name_cn:
💰Sunflower Yellow·29cm
New LouLou Lambskin, soft touch, comes with a detachable card holder and mini mirror. Features a sliding chain, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, meeting various outfit needs! The new lambskin has a coating treatment, making it more durable and glossy, making the whole bag look exquisite and beautiful!
Model: 801439~
Size: 29×17×8cm

items.name_cn:
Crimson·
New stunning bucket bag from the LE 5À7 series with a handle. New silhouette, made of Italian calfskin. The clean, structured shape looks structured yet not too sharp. Features metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. Gives a unique vibe that is both classic elegant and modern chic!
Model: 742828
Size: 26×20×12cm

items.name_cn:
Black with Gold Buckle·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A best-seller that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Rue De Solferino street name in Paris! The bag uses original fine-stitched Box calfskin with excellent flexibility and texture! It features a three-layer accordion interior for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter buckle opens vertically, completely redefining the concept of a bag clasp. It's simply too interesting!
Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm

items.name_cn:
Beige·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory patent leather cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm
